productDisplayName: Fila Men Thunder Black Basketball Sports Shoes
description: These cushioned and lightweight shoes from fila are designed to offer a comfortable sport experience coupled with style. Team this with jeans and tees to look your sporty best. Upper Synthetic upper with perforations on the fore foot and midfoot for ventilation and breathability Contrast synthetic overlays for durability Reinforced overlay over heel cup for extra support to the back foot Central laces for durability Heavily padded tongue with synthetic upper overlay for durability and synthetic fabric lining for comfort and breathability Cushioned sock liner for in step comfort and snug Fit Branding on the side and tongue Midsole EVA midsole for lightweight comfort and better shock absorption Cushioned EVA foam footbed for enhanced impact protection and comfort Removable footbed to replace with an orthotic Outsole Outsole with multidirectional herringbone pattern for superior grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dust Do not machine wash Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
